certifications:
MALAY JOSHI, UI/UX DESIGNER
Ahmedabad, India | 8734863648

| Portfolio 
UI/UX Designer with 2 years of experience crafting user-centered digital experiences across web and mobile platforms.

Specializes in designing for varied sectors, including Decentralized Finance (DeFi) and web3 Technology, with a focus on 
translating complex requirements into clean, accessible interfaces.

Skilled in conducting user research and applying design 
thinking methodologies to address challenging user needs through continuous iteration and validation.

Proven ability to bridge 
design and development by partnering closely with Development teams, product owners, and stakeholders to ship responsive, 
impactful solutions in fast-paced environments.

EXPERIENCE
UI/UX Designer | ZEEBU, Ahmedabad, Gujarat
Jul 2024 – PRESENT
ZEEBU MASTER APP
Design complete mobile DeFi experience showcasing portfolio analytics, stake oversight, token exchange hub, and ZBU 
acquisition tools with live risk assessment displays.

Created sophisticated trading panels featuring currency picker, optimal path analyzer (PancakeSwap/Uniswap), aggregator 
CEX/DEX selector, and deal status tracker.

Design stake management screens revealing total commitment, yield progression graphs, maturity countdowns, and options 
for purchase/boost/prolong/redeem/collect.

Develop a proper design system powering Zeebu Master app, establishing visual and functional consistency across all 
screens through creation of components, variants, variables, and supporting assets.

ZEEBU INVESTMENT PLATFORM
Build streamlined investment interface for Zeebu ecosystem, supporting wallet onboarding, multi-asset selection from 
connected wallets, and risk-tiered yield configurations with real-time allocation previews.

Designed portfolio overview cards displaying current holdings across ZBU, stablecoins, and ETH with maturity timers, reward 
accrual status, and redemption controls.

Shaped performance analytics section combining transaction logs, cumulative returns dashboard, and interactive allocation 
charts for comprehensive position monitoring.

Delivered Figma prototypes following detailed specification document, emphasizing clean typographic hierarchy, brand-
aligned color systems, and fluid micro-interactions for optimal DeFi user experience.

ZEEBU ACHIEVEMENT DASHBOARD
Designed comprehensive analytics dashboard for Zeebu 's settlement platform, visualizing ZBU token burns, invoice 
settlements, and reward volumes to highlight total success metrics.

Created intuitive data tables and charts for recent invoices, current rates, and ZBU pool stats (burned vs. yet-to-burn), 
improving data accessibility for telecom operators and institutions.

Developed global user list interface with map visualization and growth metrics, enabling quick insights into 139+ active 
institutions and daily settlements.

Integrated filter dropdowns and responsive layouts across multiple screens (dashboard, totals, lists), streamlining navigation 
for high-volume transaction monitoring in Web3 environment.

Collaborated on high-fidelity Figma designs based on product requirements, focusing on dark-mode UI, precise data 
rendering, and celebratory elements to boost user engagement.

UI/UX Intern | ZEEBU, Ahmedabad, Gujarat
Jul 2024 – OCT 2024
Zeebu (Figma & Design Systems)

L earned and applied Figma fundamentals including frames, layout grids, and responsive web and mobile screen design for 
real client projects.​
Built reusable design systems with components, variants, color styles, and typography tokens to keep Zeebu interfaces 
visually consistent.

Used Auto Layout and constraints to create scalable, responsive UI patterns that adapt smoothly across different screen 
sizes.

Created interactive Figma prototypes communicating user flows and micro-interactions while leveraging plugins for icons, 
illustrations, and content generation to accelerate design workflows with PMs and developers.

Page 1 of 2
Key Achievements
Designed DeFi products for 1000+ Web3 users with proven engagement impact.
Led user research shaping product strategy through trader insights.

Reduced operational errors by 25% across multiple platforms through intuitive interface design.
Maintained consistent brand identity while adapting designs for diverse user groups and technical constraints.

Selected Projects
Settlement Analytics Dashboard, Zeebu (2025): Real-time settlement dashboard tracking burns, rewards, invoice volumes, 
and treasury metrics with dynamic rate charts and institution analytics.

Investment Panel, Zeebu (2025): Intelligent DeFi yield optimizer featuring wallet onboarding, risk-adjusted APY selection, 
fund allocation previews, and NFT position tracking for seamless investment lifecycle management.

SKILLS
Design Process
User Research, User-Centered Design, Wireframing, Prototyping, Usability Testing, User Journey Mapping, Information 
Architecture, Interaction Design, Visual Design, Design Systems, Brand Consistency, Accessibility Design.

Tools & Technologies
Figma, Adobe Illustrator, Framer, Spline  3d, Lovable.dev AI builder, Google Antigravity, Notion, WordPress, SVGator, HTML, 
CSS, Responsive Design.

Communication & Collaboration
Sta keholder Management, Cross-functional Collaboration, Design Presentations, User Research Facilitation, Requirements 
Gathering, Design Documentation, Client Communication, Team Leadership.

education

CERTIFICATION
UI/UX with Figma and Adobe XD
Completed an in-depth UI/UX design course in Figma and Adobe XD, gaining advanced skills in wireframing, prototyping, and 
user testing.

This experience enabled me to design intuitive, user-centric interfaces that effectively meet user needs and 
business goals.
